description:
This quiz assesses knowledge of HTML5 semantic elements, testing the ability to distinguish and correctly use tags beyond basic <div> and <span>. It is moderately challenging, with a light‑hearted, encouraging tone that nudges learners toward best practices. The questions gauge both conceptual understanding and practical application of modern HTML markup.
Topics: HTML5 semantic tags, Document structure, Accessibility considerations, Best practices for markup
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and anyone with basic HTML experience who wants to validate and improve their semantic HTML skills.
